annotation_policy: See attachment_gold_annotation_spec.md for full rules. Singular form, lowercase, merged synonyms, no enumeration context.

gold_attachments.label: Helion PackLine-327 EV
gold_attachments.rationale: Named EV vehicle — top-level asset

gold_attachments.label: battery coolant quick connector
gold_attachments.rationale: Quick-disconnect coolant connector — this IS a connector

gold_attachments.label: coolant loss
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable loss of coolant — signal

gold_attachments.label: retaining clip
gold_attachments.rationale: Clip retaining the connector — fastener

gold_attachments.label: male tube
gold_attachments.rationale: Male tube inserted into connector — component

gold_attachments.label: O-ring land
gold_attachments.rationale: Surface where O-ring seats — seal interface (Seal > Component)

gold_attachments.label: hose end
gold_attachments.rationale: End of hose attaching to connector — component

gold_attachments.label: support bracket
gold_attachments.rationale: Bracket supporting connector/hose — component

gold_attachments.label: latch window
gold_attachments.rationale: Windows in connector body where clip latches — connector feature

gold_attachments.label: inner O-ring seat
gold_attachments.rationale: Internal seat for O-ring — seal interface (Seal > Component)

gold_attachments.label: insertion stop
gold_attachments.rationale: Physical stop for full tube insertion — component feature

gold_attachments.label: hose-end condition
gold_attachments.rationale: Condition of hose end assessed visually — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: scoring
gold_attachments.rationale: Scratch marks on tube surface — fault

gold_attachments.label: flattening
gold_attachments.rationale: Deformation of O-ring or seal — fault

gold_attachments.label: cracked plastic
gold_attachments.rationale: Cracks in connector body plastic — fault

gold_attachments.label: old seal remnant
gold_attachments.rationale: Leftover material from old seal — observable signal of past failure

gold_attachments.label: male tube surface
gold_attachments.rationale: Surface of male tube to be inspected/cleaned — component

gold_attachments.label: O-ring fragment
gold_attachments.rationale: Fragment of old O-ring to check for — signal of contamination

gold_attachments.label: dried coolant crystal
gold_attachments.rationale: Crystal residue from dried coolant — signal of contamination

gold_attachments.label: sealing land
gold_attachments.rationale: Surface where seal sits — seal interface (Seal > Component)

gold_attachments.label: O-ring track
gold_attachments.rationale: Track/groove where O-ring runs — seal feature (Seal > Component)

gold_attachments.label: replacement quick connector
gold_attachments.rationale: New connector being installed — connector

gold_attachments.label: O-ring orientation
gold_attachments.rationale: Orientation of O-ring to verify — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: full tube insertion
gold_attachments.surface_form: full tube insertion against the stop
gold_attachments.rationale: State of tube fully inserted — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: retaining clip flush and symmetric
gold_attachments.surface_form: retaining clip sits flush and symmetric in both lock windows
gold_attachments.rationale: State of clip properly seated — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: hose twist
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable twist in hose — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: clamp clocking
gold_attachments.rationale: Rotational position of clamp — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: bracket alignment
gold_attachments.rationale: Alignment of bracket — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: neutral installed state
gold_attachments.rationale: State of no side load on connector — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: reservoir response
gold_attachments.rationale: Response of coolant reservoir during bleed — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: bleed return
gold_attachments.rationale: Return flow during bleeding — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: trapped air release
gold_attachments.rationale: Air being purged from system — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: fresh wetting
gold_attachments.rationale: New wetness at connector — signal of potential leak

gold_attachments.label: seal failure
gold_attachments.surface_form: seal failure at the new connector body or O-ring seat
gold_attachments.rationale: Failure of the new seal — fault

gold_attachments.label: dry condition
gold_attachments.surface_form: remain dry under both static hold and pump-induced flow
gold_attachments.rationale: State of being leak-free — concluded acceptance state

gold_attachments.label: side shield
gold_attachments.rationale: Shield removed for access — housing/cover

gold_attachments.label: cooling branch
gold_attachments.rationale: Coolant circuit branch being serviced — coolant pathway

gold_attachments.label: removed failure mode
gold_attachments.rationale: Failure mode removed during repair — documented fault

gold_attachments.label: new connector seating confirmation
gold_attachments.rationale: Confirmation of proper seating — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: leak behavior
gold_attachments.rationale: Pattern of leaking — observable signal
